Subject: Questions About Event Policies

Dear Organizers,

I am writing to ask about the upcoming summit schedules. Specifically, could you please detail the current registrations options available? Furthermore, I need to verify if there are any special rates for large group registrations. Please also inform me when the deadline for final registrations submissions will be announced.

Best regards,
Your Name<|im_end|>
